subcodes.first_line: The Russians have conspired to harm Us, yet verily they lie beneath Our feet, though they perceive it not. The divines have denied [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اجتمع الروس علی ضرنا و انها تحت اقدامنا ولکنهم لایشعرون قد انکر العلماء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life
